params.name: Human-readable skill name
params.parentId: UUID of the parent (0x0 for genesis skills)

REWARD_PER_IMPORT().notice: Reward per skill import in SKILL tokens (1 token = 1e18)

getLineage(bytes32).notice: Get full lineage chain for a skill (root → tip).

getTopSkills(uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Get top N active skill IDs for a domain, sorted by fitness (desc).         Paginated: caller provides offset and limit.

recordImport(bytes32,address).notice: Record that an agent imported a skill (cross-agent pollination).         Issues a micro-reward to the originating agent.

registerSkill(bytes32,bytes32,string,str.notice: Register a newly promoted skill genome.

skillTokenAddress().notice: SKILL token contract (optional — set after deployment)

updateFitness(bytes32,uint32).notice: Update fitness score for an existing skill (callable by originAgent only).
